2603.22942.title: Optimizing Small Language Models for NL2SQL via Chain-of-Thought Fine-Tuning
2603.22942.paper_summary:
Translating Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) remains a critical bottleneck for democratization of data in enterprises. Although Large Language Models (LLMs) like Gemini 2.5 and other LLMs have demonstrated impressive zero-shot capabilities, their high inference costs limit deployment at scale. This paper explores the efficacy of fine-tuning both large and small language models on NL2SQL tasks.
  Our research reveals a counter-intuitive scaling phenomenon. Fine-tuning large models (Gemini 2.5 Flash/Lite) on standard datasets yields negligible returns, often leading to overfitting on complex queries. Conversely, small models (Qwen) show significant gains. Fine-tuning improved the small model baseline from 36% to 45%, and further enriching the dataset with explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning surged accuracy to 54.5%(Fig 2). While this is still lower than the accuracy of large models like Gemini 2.5 , it does serve the business goal of significant cost reduction, latency in inference time and also meeting the business critical performance accuracy threshold.This paper demonstrates that transferring reasoning patterns enables compute-efficient smaller models to approach production-grade performance.
2603.22942.paper_summary_zh:
翻譯自然語言至 SQL (NL2SQL) 仍然是企業數據民主化的一個關鍵瓶頸。儘管像 Gemini 2.5 這樣的大型語言模型 (LLMs) 及其他 LLMs 展示了令人印象深刻的零樣本能力，但其高推理成本限制了大規模部署。本文探討了在 NL2SQL 任務上微調大型和小型語言模型的有效性。<lb/>  
我們的研究揭示了一種反直覺的擴展現象。對標準數據集微調大型模型 (Gemini 2.5 Flash/Lite) 的回報微乎其微，常常導致對複雜查詢的過擬合。相反，小型模型 (Qwen) 顯示出顯著的增益。微調將小型模型的基準從 36% 提高到 45%，進一步用明確的思維鏈 (CoT) 推理豐富數據集，使準確率飆升至 54.5% (圖 2)。雖然這仍低於大型模型如 Gemini 2.5 的準確率，但它確實實現了顯著的成本降低、推理時間的延遲，並滿足了業務關鍵的性能準確性門檻。本文展示了轉移推理模式使計算效率高的小型模型能夠接近生產級性能。
2603.22942.author: Anshul Solanki et.al.
2603.22942.authors: Anshul Solanki, Sanchit Latawa, Koushik Chakraborty, Navneet Kamboj
